title: taraxacum sanguineum
intro: Taraxacum sanguineum, also known as the red dandelion, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the dandelion family. It is a medicinal plant that contains various bioactive compounds, including flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, such as constipation and bloating, and to support liver and kidney health. Taraxacum sanguineum can be prepared as herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote digestive health and reduce inflammation.
